input_question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?

candidate.question: Which trials satisfy Name of ICI = Atezolizumab AND Cancer type = Colorectal AND Control arm = Multikinase inhibitor?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?

candidate.question: Which trials have Control arm equal to Multikinase inhibitor?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?

candidate.question: What trials are for Colorectal cancer?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for Colorectal cancer had at least 4 arms and used Chemotherapy as a control?

candidate.question: Which trials have Cancer type equal to Colorectal?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?

candidate.question: Colorectal cancer trials with Number of arms >= 4 and Control regimen = 'Chemo/Anti-EGFR'.
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 4 AND "Control regimen" = 'Chemo/Anti-EGFR';
candidate.parent_question: Find Colorectal cancer trials with at least 4 arms where the control treatment was Chemo/Anti-EGFR?
